banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock filer: an individual renewing the registration certificate of their own private car at its existing RTO, with the vehicle held under a hire-purchase agreement (exercising the encumbrance branch). All names, the registration mark, chassis/engine numbers, and addresses below are fabricated test data, not a real vehicle or identity record.

collectedValues.label: Date of issue of current certificate
Date of expiry of current certificate
Registering authority by which the certificate was issued/last renewed
collectedValues.sourceRef: Form 25 — '(d) Registering authority by which the certificate was issued/last renewed'

collectedValues.label: Should the present address be entered on the renewed certificate, if not already recorded there?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Form 25 — 'I do/do not wish that it should be so entered'

collectedValues.label: Declaration: renewal has not been previously refused
collectedValues.sourceRef: Form 25 — 'The renewal of the certificate has not been refused by any registering authority.'

collectedValues.label: Declaration: certificate has not been cancelled or suspended
collectedValues.sourceRef: Form 25 — 'the certificate of registration has not been cancelled or suspended'

collectedValues.sourceRef: Form 25 — '2. The motor vehicle was registered as (a) a new vehicle'

collectedValues.sourceRef: Form 25 — '5. Month and year of manufacture'

collectedValues.sourceRef: Form 25 — 'I enclose the certificate of insurance for perusal and return.'

collectedValues.sourceRef: Form 25 — '(i) Subject to hire-purchase agreement/lease agreement with...'

collectedValues.sourceRef: Form 25 — '(i) Subject to hire-purchase agreement/lease agreement with...'

fieldsNotApplicable.reason: Not applicable to a private saloon car; the source form leaves this blank for vehicles without standee capacity.
Not applicable to a private saloon car; the source form leaves this blank for vehicles without sleeper berths.

branchNotExercised.reasoning: This packet exercises the true branch instead (encumbranceType and encumbranceHolderName both required and populated). Reasoned through separately: when false, the schema's requiredWhen on both fields correctly makes them not required, matching the ordinary unencumbered-vehicle case already exercised by the false branch in in/morth/vehicle-ownership-transfer's mock packet.

documentsNotApplicable.reason: Not applicant-supplied under Rule 52(2): the registering authority itself refers the vehicle to the fitness-testing authority. Not attached in this mock packet.
Guidance-page item marked 'as applicable'; not modelled as required for this mock filer.

attestation: documents[].renewalFee — a mock-scenario note only; no payment was made or attempted, since this schema does not submit the application. The remaining documentsNotedButNotAttached entries are noted as the fabricated filer's supporting documents/attestations, not attached as files in this JSON packet.
safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (in/morth/vehicle-registration-renewal). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to any RTO, Parivahan, VAHAN, or other government system, and every name, registration mark, chassis/engine number, and address above is a fabricated example, not a real record — the live Parivahan/VAHAN renewal e-service is a state-instanced, login-gated transactional portal with no public test/sandbox mode, so this schema's author did not attempt to exercise a live wizard end to end (see VERIFICATION.md). A human (the registered owner) must review every value below, confirm it is correct, and explicitly authorize submission through their own RTO or their state's Parivahan/VAHAN portal before this renewal is filed. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
